task: Detect when the user's observed trajectory is diverging from their intended plan, and produce a timely intervention that helps them recover.

source_families.name: EgoPER
source_families.why_it_fits: Egocentric cooking videos with explicit error taxonomy including slip, correction, modification, addition, and omission.

source_families.name: CaptainCook4D
source_families.why_it_fits: Participants follow recipe instructions correctly or deliberately induce errors.
source_families.best_use: Wrong step, wrong order, missing ingredient, and recovery examples.

source_families.name: Assembly101
source_families.why_it_fits: Large multi-view assembly videos with natural mistakes and correction segments.

source_families.name: EgoOops
source_families.why_it_fits: Small, clean setting with explicit text plan, video, mistake labels, and descriptions.

source_families.name: ATA
source_families.why_it_fits: Toy assembly recordings designed around procedural anomaly detection.

source_families.name: Shopping visual-search data
source_families.why_it_fits: Known target product and first-person search trajectory.
source_families.best_use: Detect moving away from target shelf, missing product, or fixating wrong item.

source_families.name: LookOut / Aria Navigation Dataset
source_families.why_it_fits: Navigation behavior includes rerouting, slowing down, looking around, and obstacle handling.
source_families.best_use: Infer path deviation from trajectory, gaze, and route behavior.

source_families.name: EgoCampus
source_families.why_it_fits: Pedestrian navigation with gaze, GPS, IMU, and RGB.
source_families.best_use: Compare intended path to observed path or hesitation/backtracking.

source_families.name: Ego4D / EPIC / HD-EPIC
source_families.why_it_fits: Large daily egocentric activity corpora can be filtered by narration and transcript cues.
source_families.best_use: Scale after filtering for forgot, wrong, fix, and go back evidence.
